title: Better illager texture
body:
![illageandspillage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e4d11f4771ba63c2d0e3b5678127e0aca703e8d.png)


This resourcepack will make some
illagers cooler! 

## For example:
illagerinvasion, crimson steves,
Goety, The conjurer,
illageandspillage, Invasion Code
Red, dungeons mobs.

## Dependencies:[Entity texture features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

# Note: The ownership of these resources does not belong to me.original author: illager－wither.If stolen, the consequences will be borne by oneself.

这个材质包会让一些灾厄村民变的更酷！例如：illagerinvasion，crimson steves，Goety，The conjurer，illageandspillage，Invasion Code Red，dungeons mobs.

注意：这些材质的所有权另有其人，原作者：伊拉格－凋灵，一但盗用，后果自负
